channel.title: dadlan
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: About
item.description: DadLAN awoken In the beginning of LAN parties, kids would hug their 17 inch CRTs across cities to host local game servers and stink up their parents basements. These kids now run and maintain domains, deny pull requests and change diapers. These fellow dads get together to get back to their roots. Loud celebrations of good food, drinks, and smoke are had!

item.title: Dadlan 2k19
item.description: dadlan.com is here! Hugo is pretty rad Spring (Liberty Lake, WA) lol too many naps.

item.title: Dadlan 2k18
item.description: Spring (Liberty Lake, WA) So much Kingdom Come Matt and Jordon destroying everyone in Quake and Overwatch Chris drove across the state to take naps Alan threw up in Riley’s car Fall (Leavenworth, WA) Edibles for days Jumping into frigid waters Serious Sam is Serious Zach can clear a room of nerds Hitting on photographers
